personal.name: Meqdad A. Darwish
personal.title: Back-End Developer · Founder @ Bunyan Flow
personal.tagline: Software Engineer (Back-end) ✦ Product-minded ✦ Technical Writer ✦ Robotics ✦ EdTech

summary: I'm a back-end developer — building my own product, and open to my next role.

Bunyan Flow is a bilingual (Arabic/English) property management platform I founded. I'm building the MVP end to end — Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL — owning everything from requirements analysis and database design to RESTful services, KPI dashboards, and CI/CD with GitHub Actions. Solo founder means full SDLC, full accountability. No handoffs. If it's broken, it's mine to fix.

Before that: production back-end work at LogesTechs, where I built and maintained a logistics system processing 30k+ daily data entries — customer wallet features, audit logging, real-time reporting. Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, Agile teams.

I also spent years on the education side of tech — training 2,000+ learners, from students to Ministry of Education engineers, and leading ToT programmes in robotics and AI. That chapter taught me something most developers learn late: if you can't explain a system simply, you don't understand it yet. It made me a better engineer, and it's why building products people actually understand comes naturally to me.

Open source is where I sharpen the saw: my Python packages on PyPI have passed 50k+ downloads. I write technical articles on databases (SQL and NoSQL), clean code, AI, and programming — with Java and Spring Boot topics coming next.
Off the keyboard: volunteering, books. Half my reading is technical and the other half is everything else, because the best engineers I know are readers first.
knowledgeFields: Computer Vision: TensorFlow, TensorFlow Lite, YOLO Object Detection, MediaPipe
Data Science: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, scikit-learn

details: Founded Bunyan Flow, a property management platform for property owners and property management companies, covering buildings, units, tenants, lease contracts, rent payments, expenses, and financial and operational reports, with a fully bilingual Arabic/English interface.

Building the product MVP end to end with the back end as the core focus: Java, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL, covering requirements analysis, database design, RESTful services, and KPI dashboards, managed across the full SDLC with GitHub and GitHub Actions under an Agile/Kanban workflow.
Owning the wider founder scope: project planning and management, server management, and early-customer support and relationship management (CRM).
Designed and implemented robotics, computer vision, and electronics projects; prepared ready-to-use code examples for sensors, microcontrollers, and other components.
Provided technical support to customers, addressing inquiries and troubleshooting hardware and software issues.
Managed e-commerce product listings and inventory operations, and created content for product launches.

Developed and maintained a logistics management system using Java, JDBC, Spring Boot, and MySQL, designing RESTful APIs processing 30k+ daily data entries for delivery companies and fulfillment warehouses.
Implemented major features for the customer wallet service, managing transactions, points, and credits across customer accounts.
Built a logging service to track and audit account changes, and integrated Jasper Reports to generate real-time logistics operation reports.
Contributed to the package tracking system through bug fixes, performance improvements, and new features.
Worked in an Agile environment with cross-functional teams to improve system performance, scalability, and reliability.
Developed ToT materials and supplementary training resources on robotics, AI, and digital learning tools.
Coached and followed up with trainers at Purpose Academy on advanced technical subjects; supported the team in staying current with Robotics and AI tools.
Researched and prototyped educational technology solutions across Computer Vision, Robotics, IoT, and Web Development.
Led the company's trainer team; designed syllabi and STEM/STEAM training materials for advanced courses delivered to schools, universities, and professionals.

Coordinated and led Training-of-Trainers (ToT) projects in Robotics and AI with the Ministry of Education (MoE), Ministry of Telecommunication and Information Technology (MTIT), NGOs, and universities.
Managed course planning and delivery schedules, followed up on trainer performance, and documented training outcomes for stakeholders.
Developed open-source teaching tools (Teachable Machine and Detectors World Python packages) used in classrooms and training programs.

Trained 2,000+ learners, from high school and university students to public- and private-sector employees, including Ministry of Education technical engineers and private-school ICT teachers, in Robotics, Python, Web Development, IoT, and Computer Vision.

Served as a consultant to private schools, helping them integrate robotics and STEM tools into effective, student-centered learning through both curricular and extra-curricular approaches, and advising on their robotics and AI strategic plans.

Built an examination system with student account management as part of the LMS back-end team: designed the database schema (PostgreSQL), developed back-end services with Python and Django REST, implemented JWT authentication, and deployed on AWS EC2.
Installed and trained educators on Robotel's SmartClass+ and Let's Talk! smart classroom products; delivered demos and led product awareness campaigns to expand STEM education tools in schools.
Provided ongoing technical support and documentation to education partners and managed the integration of smart tools into STEM education.
Built the front end of a dynamic reporting system in React: reusable components, responsive interfaces, and integration with back-end APIs for real-time data.
Sold electronics, microcontrollers, and other electronic accessories for coursework and senior projects at the Faculty of Engineering and Technology at PPU.
Provided technical support to customers/students.
Supplied university labs with required tools such as microcontrollers, motors, sensors, and other related equipment.
Prepared servers and installed required operating systems such as Windows Server.
Worked with VMware vSphere for server resource management.
Installed storage units.
Conducted periodic visits and provided technical support to customers.

education.notes: Member of IEEE Student Branch. Organized Tech Workshops. Founded PPU Electronics Online Store.

projects.name: Detectors World
projects.description: A Python package for building Computer Vision applications easily, built on top of MediaPipe. Available detectors: Hand, Face, Pose, and Face Mesh Detection.

projects.name: Teachable Machine
projects.description: A Python package to simplify integrating exported models from Google's Teachable Machine platform into various environments.

projects.name: PixCraft
projects.description: A powerful image processing and computer vision application that allows users to explore and manipulate digital images with an intuitive interface.

projects.name: Teachable Machine Lite
projects.description: A lightweight Python package optimized for integrating Teachable Machine models into robotics and embedded systems environments.
